final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input [3:0] audio_in1,
    input [3:0] audio_in2,
    output reg [3:0] mixed_audio
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        mixed_audio <= (audio_in1 + audio_in2 > 15) ? 15 : (audio_in1 + audio_in2);
    end
    
endmodule
